---
title: "Continuing from a Previous Document"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
  typst:
    output-file: "example-continuation-typst.pdf"
filters:
  - ../_extensions/footnote-styles/footnote-styles.lua
extensions:
  footnote-styles:
    style: "roman-lower"
    text-suffix: "."
    start-at: 4
---

This document is part of a series. The previous part had three footnotes, so this one begins at iv.[^1] The numbering continues naturally.[^2] And so on.[^3]

A fourth footnote here.[^4] And a fifth.[^5]

[^1]: First footnote in this document; marker is iv.
[^2]: Second footnote; marker is v.
[^3]: Third footnote; marker is vi.
[^4]: Fourth footnote; marker is vii.
[^5]: Fifth footnote; marker is viii.
